name: cursor-skills-scripts
description: Scripts for cursor-skills: skill sync, url (fetch with retry).

scripts.test: node --test skills/test/sync.test.js skills/test/skills-validate.test.js skills/test/install-integration.test.js url/test/visited.test.js url/test/link-filter.test.js url/test/fetch.test.js url/test/interactive.test.js context/test/context.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --experimental-test-coverage --test skills/test/sync.test.js skills/test/skills-validate.test.js url/test/visited.test.js url/test/link-filter.test.js url/test/fetch.test.js url/test/interactive.test.js context/test/context.test.js
